channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Voi bikes parking in car charging bay, 24th June
item.description:
Many Voi bikes seem to think they can park here. Been going on for a month

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hemsworth Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped, 24th June
item.description:
Been there for 3 weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hemsworth Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of broken paving slabs., 24th June
item.description:
There are lots of broken paving slabs outside of the shop. They are sticking up and I tripped up, luckily I was not injured, but somebody could be. Caused by vehicles driving onto the pavement to deliver to the shop.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car rotting away, 24th June
item.description:
Over 6 years the car been here. Even though it is a sorn vehicle it is on public car parking space that bromley owns
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widecombe Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th June
item.description:
An old trampoline has been dumped on the grass by the flats.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Federation Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th June
item.description:
2 large plastic containers (paint?) and a broken paving slab dumped by the road sign at the bottom of Shornells Way at junction with Federation.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Federation Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken furniture dumped on Cester Street, 24th June
item.description:
Broken furniture and household goods belonging to residents of Gloucester Square and Cester Street dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th June
item.description:
Bags of rubbish/clothing dumped on pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Federation Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 24th June
item.description:
Full of dog waste and smelling

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Smashed up car with smashed glass, 24th June
item.description:
Smash up vehicle
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 23 to 18 - In bushes, 24th June
item.description:
In bushes dumped rubbish bags as well as bicycles all along the bushes
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Broken Quad bike parked for over 5 year years, 24th June
item.description:
Quad bike has been parked in a public area , covered up, not working for over 5 years on Kellaway Road. Taking up valuable parking space.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with flat tire for over 6 month, 24th June
item.description:
This car has been parked in a public area with a flat tire for over 6 months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti at the bus stop, 24th June
item.description:
Needs removing as offensive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped lime bike, 24th June
item.description:
Lime bike is locked by the back wheel. Its been here for over 10 days now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Zambezie Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Herbert road, 24th June
item.description:
This rubbish has been there for weeks and seems to get worse. It’s so bad and dirty looking

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park on residential, 24th June
item.description:
Park or abandoned vehicle on residential street without parking permit multiple cars to same address 71 ravensdale rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rookwood Road, Hackney, London

item.description:

item.title: Parked on residential, 24th June
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravensdale Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Mattress, 24th June
item.description:
